forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloud clearing. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 20 to 25.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 20 to 25.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm at night. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. A thunderstorm likely. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. A thunderstorm likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Stuart Highway, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 28.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Oodnadatta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm at night. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
